golden_set.query: What is the total number of unique stocks (ISU_CD) listed in the table?
What is the average base price (BASE_PRC) of stocks that are marked as small and medium-sized enterprises (SMSC_YN = 'Y')?
How many stocks have a listing date (LIST_DD) after January 1, 2020?
What is the total capital amount (CAPT_AMT) for stocks that are not under trade suspension (TDHL_YN = 'N')?
What is the total number of stocks that are marked as investment caution stocks (IVWR_ISU_YN = 'Y') and have a market alert risk warning (MKT_ALRT_RISK_ADNT_YN = 'Y')?
What is the average trading price (TD_PRC) for each market (MKT_ID) on the latest date (DWDD)?
What is the total trading quantity (TRD_QTY) for each stock (ISU_CD) in the last 7 days?
What is the highest trading price (TD_PRC) for each board (BRD_ID) in the last month?
What is the total trading quantity (TRD_QTY) for each stock (ISU_CD) where the stock name (ISU_ABWD_NM) contains 'Samsung'?
What is the average trading price (TD_PRC) for each session (SESS_ID) on the latest date (DWDD)?
What is the average ask price for the first step across all records in the table?
How many records are there for the market ID 'KSQ' on the date '2023-10-01'?
What is the total bid quantity for the first step for the board ID 'G1'?
What is the maximum ask price for the fifth step for the session ID '42'?
What is the total ask quantity for the first step for each market ID and board ID?
What is the total sell and buy order quantity for each market ID on the latest date?
What is the average buy order quantity for each stock code in the last 7 days?
How many unique stock codes are there for each market ID and board ID combination?
What is the total sell order quantity for each stock code that has a specific product group ID ('G3')?
What is the maximum buy order quantity for each market ID on a specific date ('2023-10-01')?
What is the average number of upward trending stocks (FLUC_UP_CT) per day for the market 'KSQ'?
How many records are there for the 'STK' market where the data calculation time is after '150000'?
What is the sum of the number of stocks hitting the upper limit (FLUC_UPLM_CT) and the number of stocks hitting the lower limit (FLUC_LWLM_CT) for each day?
What is the total number of downward trending stocks (FLUC_DN_CT) for the 'KSQ' market on the latest date available?
What is the total number of upward trending stocks (FLUC_UP_CT) for each market (MKT_ID) on '2023-10-01'?
What is the total 매도차익잔량 (ASK_ARB_RQTY) for the market 'STK' on the latest date?
What is the average 매수비차익잔량 (BID_NARB_RQTY) for each market (MKT_ID) over the past 7 days?
What is the total 위탁매도차익체결수량 (TRAK_ARB_TD_QTY) for each 종목코드 (ISU_CD) on '2023-10-01'?
What is the total 위탁매수차익거래대금 (TRBD_ARB_TRVAL) for each market (MKT_ID) and 종목코드 (ISU_CD) on the latest date?
What is the total 매도차익잔량 (ASK_ARB_RQTY) for each 종목코드 (ISU_CD) joined with its 종목명 (ISU_ABWD_NM) from NX_HT_BAT_REFER_A0 on the latest date?
What is the total ask arbitrage transaction value for the market 'STK' on the latest date?
What is the average bid non-arbitrage transaction quantity for each investor type code on '2023-01-01'?
What is the total ask arbitrage transaction value for each market ID over the last 7 days?
What is the total bid arbitrage transaction value for each market ID and investor type code on the latest calculation time for each date?
What is the total ask non-arbitrage transaction quantity for each market ID, joined with the corresponding market price data for the same date?
